clusters.name: City Core — Service Keywords
clusters.description: Primary service keywords combined with city names. Highest volume, highest intent.
clusters.suggestedH1: Dumpster Rental in {City}, CA — Same-Day Delivery from Local Yards

clusters.name: Size + City
clusters.description: Dumpster size combined with city. Very high commercial intent — user knows what they need.
clusters.suggestedTitle: {Size} Yard Dumpster Rental {City} CA | From ${price} | Calsan

clusters.name: Concrete / Heavy Material + City
clusters.description: Heavy inert material keywords. Premium flat-fee pricing. High margin.

clusters.suggestedTitle: Concrete Dumpster Rental {City} CA | Flat Fee | Calsan Dumpsters Pro

clusters.name: Contractor / Job Type + City
clusters.description: Construction, remodel, and job-specific keywords. High intent, repeat customer potential.
clusters.suggestedTitle: {JobType} Dumpster Rental {City} CA | Calsan Dumpsters Pro

clusters.name: Commercial + City
clusters.description: Commercial and industrial dumpster keywords. Lower volume but high LTV.

clusters.name: Permit + City
clusters.description: Permit-related searches. High intent in SF (SFMTA). Informational but captures ready-to-buy users.

clusters.name: Pricing + City
clusters.description: Price/cost queries combined with city. Commercial intent — comparison shoppers.
clusters.suggestedH1: Dumpster Rental Prices in {City}, CA — Transparent Pricing
clusters.suggestedTitle: Dumpster Rental Prices {City} CA | Instant Quote | Calsan
keywords: how much is a dumpster rental {city}

clusters.name: ZIP Code Pages (SEO)
clusters.description: ZIP-targeted landing pages for hyper-local SEO. Capture long-tail traffic.
clusters.suggestedTitle: Dumpster Rental {ZIP} | {City} CA | Calsan Dumpsters Pro

clusters.name: Near Me — Generic
clusters.description: Non-localized 'near me' searches. Captured by GMB + homepage SEO.

clusters.suggestedTitle: Dumpster Rental Near Me | Bay Area | Calsan Dumpsters Pro

clusters.name: FAQ / Informational
clusters.description: Question-based queries. Build topical authority. Low direct conversion but high for featured snippets.
clusters.suggestedH1: Dumpster Rental FAQ — Everything You Need to Know
clusters.suggestedTitle: Dumpster Rental FAQ | Sizes, Prices, Permits | Calsan
